ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campsites" (
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campsite */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the campsite location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the campsite location */,
  "campsite_name" TEXT /* Name of the campsite */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the campsite */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the campsite */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the campsite is located */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province where the campsite is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the campsite location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the campsite is located */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the campsite */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the campsite */,
  "campsite_description" TEXT /* Description of the campsite */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the campsite (average of user reviews) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campsite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campsite was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campsite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campsite offering the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., Wi-Fi, Laundry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Whether the amenity is free or not */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Whether the amenity is paid or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_campsite_id FOREIGN KEY ("campsite_id") REFERENCES campsites ("campsite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campsite offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., RV Repair, Tour Bookings) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Whether the service is free or not */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Whether the service is paid or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_campsite_id FOREIGN KEY ("campsite_id") REFERENCES campsites ("campsite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campsite offering the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., Hiking, Fishing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Whether the activity is free or not */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Whether the activity is paid or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_campsite_id FOREIGN KEY ("campsite_id") REFERENCES campsites ("campsite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campsite_regions" (
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campsite */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the campsite is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campsite_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, staff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campsite being booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date of check-in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date of check-out */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_campsite_id FOREIGN KEY ("campsite_id") REFERENCES campsites ("campsite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the review */,
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campsite being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_campsite_id FOREIGN KEY ("campsite_id") REFERENCES campsites ("campsite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Type of payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_details" (
  "payment_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment detail */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used (e.g., USD, CAD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_details_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campsite_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campsite owned */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campsite_owners_campsite_id FOREIGN KEY ("campsite_id") REFERENCES campsites ("campsite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campsite_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campsite the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campsite_images_campsite_id FOREIGN KEY ("campsite_id") REFERENCES campsites ("campsite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campsite_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "campsite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campsite the video belongs to */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campsite_videos_campsite_id FOREIGN KEY ("campsite_id") REFERENCES campsites ("campsite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, booking) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
